name: impl-wave4
description: Hand-author impls from terraform providers and Go clients

members.name: oci-writer
members.prompt: Read task #2. Write impls/oracle_cloud/config.yaml, axioms.dl, README.md for OCI. Focus on 5-6 core resources (compartment, instance, vcn, subnet, user, group). Read impls/vultr/config.yaml for cloud compute conventions. Mark task complete.
